description: Telecom domain action schema library for FACT-Bench. 15 actions. Each action declares required_params/optional_params (referencing slots in telecom_slots.json), preconditions, side_effects (slot writes), and an automatable flag. Serves C3 (action grounding / taxonomy) and C4 (SOTA action-planning evaluation). param and side_effect slot names must resolve against data/slots/telecom_slots.json.

verify_identity.name: verify_identity
verify_identity.description: Authenticate the customer before any account-modifying action.

check_data_usage.name: check_data_usage
check_data_usage.description: Retrieve remaining data against the plan allowance.

change_plan.name: change_plan
change_plan.description: Switch the subscriber to a different plan tier.

add_addon.name: add_addon
add_addon.description: Subscribe the customer to a value-added add-on.

update_contact_info.name: update_contact_info
update_contact_info.description: Update one or more customer contact fields.

suspend_service.name: suspend_service
suspend_service.description: Temporarily suspend the mobile service line.

activate_device.name: activate_device
activate_device.description: Activate a new device on the customer's line.

report_lost_device.name: report_lost_device
report_lost_device.description: Report a device lost/stolen and lock the line.

upgrade_device.name: upgrade_device
upgrade_device.description: Upgrade to a new device under an installment agreement.

pay_bill.name: pay_bill
pay_bill.description: Post a payment against the current telecom bill.

check_contract_status.name: check_contract_status
check_contract_status.description: Retrieve remaining contract term and commitment details.

escalate_to_human.name: escalate_to_human
escalate_to_human.description: Hand off the conversation to a human agent.
